# Prompt ID
USR-D02-imggen-gptImage

# Domain / Category
D — AI & Prompt Workflows / D02 Image Prompt Generation

# Description
Generate an image prompt for GPT Image.

# Prompt
Generate a GPT Image prompt for {{idea}} with {{aspect}} ratio.

# Parameters
- idea
  - Description: The visual concept.
- aspect
  - Description: Aspect ratio.

# Example Values
idea:
- "a cat on a moon"

aspect:
- 16:9
- 1:1

# Notes
- Recommended system prompt: `SYS-D02-image-prompt-generation`.
- META

# Keywords
image generation, gpt-image, meta-prompt, D02
